creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ian Lepore from comment #1)

Thank you for explanation. This is not obvious from the synopsis. Perhaps, it should be made more clear by replacing "directory ..." with "directory1 ... directoryN" just like previous lines already have "file1 ... file N directory".

Also, one can consider this as PR feature request then: teach install(1) to create missing directories while copying files. It could use new "-F" flag for that to force such creation.
